Bonus: Free SmartQR App Included

Everyone gets access to the free SmartQR app, even if you don't use NFC. Create and share your digital contact card with QR codes on any device.

QR Code Sharing: Share your contact with anyone, even without NFC

Real-Time Updates: Change your info once, update everywhere instantly

Cross-Platform: Works on iOS, Android, and web browsers
